## Meeting Purpose

[Sync between Marcel and Molly to discuss operational updates, equipment logistics, and team management.](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Auto-payments set up for team; August invoices ready for approval](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Laptops shipped to new hires; considering English-only keyboards for future orders](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Benefits page mock-up created; flexible PTO policy with 20 days/year target](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
  - [Exploring custom equipment options (e.g., high-quality webcams) for team members](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)

## Topics

### Team Payments and Invoicing

  - [Auto-payments established for recurring team payments](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [August invoices submitted with prorated amounts, awaiting approval](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Marcel to approve invoices, trusting Molly's rate verification](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)

### Equipment Logistics

  - [Laptops shipped to new hires (except Sammy's, on hold)](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Issue: Some laptops may have non-English keyboards](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [Solution: Aim for English-only keyboards in future orders for consistency and reusability](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Hoppy (vendor) can't ship laptops between countries but offers buyback/refund options](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Voice Subscription and Laptop Payments

  - [$100 annual subscription paid via credit card](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Laptop costs not immediately visible in account; need to monitor for charges](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [1-year protection plan purchased; 3-year option available ($350/person)](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Equipment Options and Considerations

  - [Refurbished laptops available (\~$500) for future hires](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Custom add-ons possible through Hoppy (e.g., high-quality webcams)](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Marcel recommends specific oval camera for team members on client calls](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)

### Team Benefits and Time Off

  - [Benefits page mock-up created, including PTO policy](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
  - [Flexible PTO with 20 days/year target recommended](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [Advice: Avoid extended time off in first 3-6 months of employment](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
  - [US holidays listed but not mandatory; encourage flexible time off](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [Year-end blackout period: Dec 24 - Jan 3 (no client meetings, recharge time)](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)

### Hiring and Job Postings

  - [Brand Designer and Prompt AI job descriptions ready for posting](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Focus on portfolio quality for creative roles](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Plan to use hands-on exercises in interview process](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Molly to update and share benefits page mock-up for approval](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [Investigate high-quality webcam options for team members](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Post Brand Designer and Prompt AI job descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Molly to ask Jimmy if he needs a laptop](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [Monitor Voice account for laptop charges](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Implement year-end blackout period (Dec 24 - Jan 3) in company calendar](https://fathom.video/share/iUKVc6E-_LTiJ4mhYK-bTTVy6pHqesS7?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
